label: Cost Allocation & Tagging
description: Assigning cloud spend to teams, projects, or cost centers via tags and account hierarchies.

label: Spend Anomaly Detection
description: Identifying unexpected cost spikes or drops relative to historical baselines.

label: Resource Rightsizing
description: Recommending or applying instance/service size changes to reduce over-provisioning.

label: Commitment Management
description: Purchasing and tracking Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, or committed-use discounts.

label: Showback & Chargeback
description: Generating per-team cost reports and processing internal billing transfers.

label: Budget Alerting
description: Monitoring spend against budgets and triggering alerts or escalations on thresholds.

label: Idle Resource Cleanup
description: Detecting and decommissioning unused instances, volumes, snapshots, and IPs.

label: Cost Forecasting
description: Projecting future cloud spend by service, team, or project for planning cycles.

label: Invoice Reconciliation
description: Matching cloud provider invoices against internal cost data and resolving discrepancies.

label: Unit Economics Reporting
description: Computing cost-per-transaction, cost-per-customer, or other business-unit metrics.

label: Policy Enforcement
description: Automatically detecting and remediating non-compliant resources (e.g., oversized, untagged).

label: Vendor Negotiation Support
description: Compiling usage data, benchmarks, and contract analysis to support cloud discount negotiations.
